meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no design skills (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing for Non-Designers: A Freelancer's Guide
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with design. Learn how to build high-converting SaaS pricing tables using Antigravity and Claude Code. Perfect for busy freelancers.
content.answer_block: To overcome design limitations, leverage component-based AI tools like Antigravity to generate clean, responsive pricing tables. By integrating Claude Code, you automate the implementation process, ensuring your SaaS pricing structures are not only visually professional but also functionally robust, allowing you to ship client projects with speed and precision.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client needs a high-converting SaaS pricing page by Friday, but your design skills are feeling the pressure of a blank canvas. You know the logic, you understand the conversion funnels, but the visual execution feels like a bottleneck that keeps you from scaling your freelance business.

Stop wrestling with CSS frameworks and pixel alignment. The era of the 'designer-developer' hybrid is over; the era of the 'AI-Architect' has arrived. By utilizing Antigravity’s component-generation capabilities alongside the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can bypass the design phase entirely and deliver enterprise-grade UI that converts.

steps.title: Define the Conversion Strategy
steps.description: Before writing code, define your pricing tiers. Use a three-column structure: Basic, Pro, and Enterprise. Focus on highlighting the 'Pro' tier as the primary conversion target.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern, minimalist 3-column SaaS pricing table component using Tailwind CSS. Include a 'Most Popular' badge on the middle tier, hover effects for buttons, and responsive grid layout.

steps.title: Inject Dynamic Data Logic
steps.description: Hardcoding prices is a rookie mistake. Use Claude Code to refactor the static components into a data-driven model that accepts props for easy client updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the pricing component to accept an array of objects for pricing tiers. Ensure it handles monthly/yearly toggle state via React hooks.

steps.title: Implement Responsive Breakpoints
steps.description: Ensure the layout collapses gracefully on mobile devices. Claude Code can scan your CSS and enforce mobile-first best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the pricing component for mobile screens. Ensure the 'Most Popular' tier stays centered and stacks properly without breaking the layout.

steps.title: Add Conversion-Focused Micro-Interactions
steps.description: Add subtle animations to buttons when hovered to increase user engagement and click-through rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Framer Motion hover animations to the CTA buttons in the pricing table. Make the 'Pro' card scale slightly on hover.

steps.title: Final Integration and QA
steps.description: Run a final scan to ensure the pricing component integrates seamlessly with your existing SaaS dashboard theme.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a design system audit on the Pricing.tsx file. Ensure all colors and font sizes match the existing project theme variables.

pro_tips: Always use a 'ghost' button for the lowest tier to draw attention to the high-value middle tier.
Use CSS clamp() for font sizes to ensure your pricing text remains readable across all screen sizes without media query bloat.
Implement a 'yearly discount' toggle that updates the price state globally to increase upfront revenue.
Use semantic HTML (e.g., <section>, <ul>, <li>) for your pricing table to ensure accessibility and better SEO ranking.
Pre-fill your pricing components with sample data that reflects your client's actual industry to get immediate approval.
content.next_steps: Once the pricing table is live, implement a simple A/B test using your new modular component to see which tier performs best, then iterate based on conversion data.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design gaps stall your freelance growth. With Antigravity and Claude Code, you can ship premium UI in minutes, not days. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
